languages.text: {n}Высокий Фактотум с удовлетворенным видом поправляет монокль.{/n} "Благодарю за милость, Ваша Светлость. Прежде, чем вы покинете Сектор Бионика, я также хотел бы представить вам генетора мажорис Ферренца и вивисектора Джейса Мартинакса. Сейчас они проводят неотложную операцию и посему не смогли присутствовать при осмотре лично, но, я уверен, воспримут визит Вольного Торговца как величайшую честь. Прошу следовать за мной".

{n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. They are currently performing an urgent procedure and therefore were unable to attend the inspection in person, but I am certain they will receive the Rogue Trader's visit as a great honour. If you will follow me."
languages.original_text: {n}Высокий Фактотум с удовлетворенным видом поправляет монокль.{/n} "Благодарю за милость, Ваша Светлость. languages.text: {n}Le haut factotum ajuste son monocle d'un air satisfait.{/n} « Merci pour votre aide, Votre Seigneurie. Avant votre départ pour le secteur Bionica, j'aimerais vous présenter le genetor majoris Ferrenz et le vivisector Jaze Martinax. Ils sont actuellement occupés par une procédure urgente et par conséquent, ne se sont pas présentés à l'inspection en personne. Cependant, il ne fait aucun doute qu'ils verront la visite {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} comme un grand honneur. Si vous voulez bien me suivre. »
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. They are currently performing an urgent procedure and therefore were unable to attend the inspection in person, but I am certain they will receive the Rogue Trader's visit as a great honour. If you will follow me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le haut factotum ajuste son monocle d'un air satisfait.{/n} « Merci pour votre aide, Votre Seigneurie. Avant votre départ pour le secteur Bionica, j'aimerais vous présenter le genetor majoris Ferrenz et le vivisector Jaze Martinax. Ils sont actuellement occupés par une procédure urgente et par conséquent, ne se sont pas présentés à l'inspection en personne. Cependant, il ne fait aucun doute qu'ils verront la visite {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} comme un grand honneur. Si vous voulez bien me suivre. »

languages.text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum rückt mit einem zufriedenen Blick sein Monokel zurecht.{/n} "Danke für Euer Wohlwollen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Bevor Ihr den Sektor Bionica verlasst, würde ich Euch außerdem gerne Genetor Majoris Ferrenz und Vivisektor Jaze Martinax vorstellen. Sie sind derzeit mit einer dringenden Prozedur befasst und konnten der Inspektion deshalb nicht persönliche beiwohnen, aber ich bin sicher, sie werden einen Besuch {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} als große Ehre empfinden. Wenn Ihr mir bitte folgen würdet."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. They are currently performing an urgent procedure and therefore were unable to attend the inspection in person, but I am certain they will receive the Rogue Trader's visit as a great honour. If you will follow me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum rückt mit einem zufriedenen Blick sein Monokel zurecht.{/n} "Danke für Euer Wohlwollen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Bevor Ihr den Sektor Bionica verlasst, würde ich Euch außerdem gerne Genetor Majoris Ferrenz und Vivisektor Jaze Martinax vorstellen. Sie sind derzeit mit einer dringenden Prozedur befasst und konnten der Inspektion deshalb nicht persönliche beiwohnen, aber ich bin sicher, sie werden einen Besuch {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} als große Ehre empfinden. Wenn Ihr mir bitte folgen würdet."

languages.text: {n}高阶顾问满意地扶了扶单片眼镜。{/n}“感谢您的厚爱，大人。在您离开仿生区之前，我还想向您引荐高级基因士费伦茨和解剖者杰兹·马丁纳克斯。他们目前正在实施一项紧急手术，因此无法亲自前来迎检，但我确信行商浪人的造访对他们而言一定是莫大的荣耀。请随我来。”
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. They are currently performing an urgent procedure and therefore were unable to attend the inspection in person, but I am certain they will receive the Rogue Trader's visit as a great honour. If you will follow me."

traits.locale_text: {n}高阶顾问满意地扶了扶单片眼镜。{/n}“感谢您的厚爱，大人。在您离开仿生区之前，我还想向您引荐高级基因士费伦茨和解剖者杰兹·马丁纳克斯。他们目前正在实施一项紧急手术，因此无法亲自前来迎检，但我确信行商浪人的造访对他们而言一定是莫大的荣耀。请随我来。”

languages.text: {n}El Sumo Factótum se ajusta el monóculo, satisfecho.{/n} «Le agradezco el favor, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Antes de que se marche del Sector Bionica, me gustaría presentarle también al genetor majoris Ferrenz y al vivisector Jaze Martinax. Actualmente están ejecutando un procedimiento urgente y no han podido estar presentes durante la inspección, pero seguro que considerarán un gran honor la visita de{mf|l| la}Comerciante Independiente. Sígame, por favor».
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. They are currently performing an urgent procedure and therefore were unable to attend the inspection in person, but I am certain they will receive the Rogue Trader's visit as a great honour. If you will follow me."

Sígame, por favor».

languages.text: {n}Arşıkâhya, memnun bir bakışla monoklunu düzeltiyor.{/n} "Lütfunuz için teşekkür ederim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sektör Biyonika'dan ayrılmadan önce sizi Genetör Majoris Ferrenz ve Dirikesimci Jaze Martinax ile de tanıştırmak isterim. Şu anda acil bir prosedür yürüttüklerinden teftişe bizzat katılamadılar ancak Hür Tacir'in ziyaretini büyük bir onur olarak kabul edeceklerdir. Lütfen beni takip edin."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. If you will follow me."

languages.text: {n}高官は満足げな表情で片眼鏡を調整する。{/n}「お礼申し上げます。貴殿の御寵愛に感謝いたします。セクター・ビオニカを離れる前に、ジェネター・マジョリス・フェレンツとヴィヴィセクター・ジャゼ・マルティナックスもご挨拶させてください。彼らは緊急の手術を行っており、検査に直接出席することができませんでした。しかし、貴殿の訪問を大変光栄に思っていることでしょう。どうぞ、お付き合いください。」
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum adjusts his monocle with a satisfied look.{/n} "I thank you for your favour, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Before you depart the Sector Bionica, I would also like to present to you Genetor Majoris Ferrenz and Vivisector Jaze Martinax. They are currently performing an urgent procedure and therefore were unable to attend the inspection in person, but I am certain they will receive the Rogue Trader's visit as a great honour. If you will follow me."

traits.locale_text: {n}高官は満足げな表情で片眼鏡を調整する。{/n}「お礼申し上げます。貴殿の御寵愛に感謝いたします。セクター・ビオニカを離れる前に、ジェネター・マジョリス・フェレンツとヴィヴィセクター・ジャゼ・マルティナックスもご挨拶させてください。彼らは緊急の手術を行っており、検査に直接出席することができませんでした。しかし、貴殿の訪問を大変光栄に思っていることでしょう。どうぞ、お付き合いください。」
